executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned topology is coherent (21 total, 20 enabled, 1 disabled, 0 enabled-duplicate-collision). Whole-stack certification blocked only by external marketing evidence.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Obtain fresh marketing independent verification backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json --all plus live artifact cross-checks

live_last_error_details.marketing-research-daily: cron: job interrupted by gateway restart
live_last_error_details.backlink-tracker: cron: job interrupted by gateway restart

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails closed (verdict=fail, checked_at=2026-06-02). Reddit/Apollo channels remain blocked. Primary-repo adoption is flat.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing; distribution channels are blocked without replacement paths.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: Duplicate cron job 'marketing-pulse' — fully resolved
findings.mechanism: Old marketing-pulse job (85d5ff81-b7b1-4e16-ae7b-9e088aec6551, Reddit-only, 5x daily) disabled in live cron. Single multi-channel marketing-pulse (ad9540d0-856a-4cc2-886e-b51d548bf6e1, Reddit+SEO+competitive+website) is sole enabled pulse job. Zero enabled duplicate names. Name collision is benign.
findings.root_cause: Second marketing-pulse job created without disabling the older one. Corrected by disabling the superseded old job.
evidence_refs: openclaw cron list --json --all: 21 total, 20 enabled, 1 disabled, 0 enabled duplicate names

findings.title: Architecture-owned topology discrepancy resolved
findings.mechanism: Live topology coherent: 21 total, 20 enabled, 1 disabled. Two transient error jobs (marketing-research-daily, backlink-tracker) from gateway restart — both non-persistent.
findings.root_cause: Stale job count carried forward from previous audit runs. Fresh direct cron inspection is now the source of truth on every watchdog run.
findings.recommended_fix: DONE. Direct cron inspection is source of truth on every watchdog run.

findings.title: Two transient error jobs: marketing-research-daily and backlink-tracker
findings.mechanism: Both jobs show status=error with lastError='cron: job interrupted by gateway restart'. These are gateway-restart transients, not persistent failures.
findings.root_cause: Gateway restart interrupted in-flight cron runs.
findings.recommended_fix: Monitor next run cycles for self-recovery. If consecutive errors exceed 2, escalate. Currently transient.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on freshness and ownership gates
findings.mechanism: Loop integrity, ownership boundaries, and shared market-intelligence consumption remain coherent. Checker: AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Independent verification: qualified_pass. Verifier: ok=true, errors=[] (freshness gate satisfied — independent artifact newer than all runtime peers).
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining risk is external marketing evidence.
findings.recommended_fix: No architecture-owned fix needed; verifier path is green.

findings.title: Loop 'pypi-auto-unblocker' has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Script has no self-improvement mandate. When outcomes are flat, this loop will repeat the same tactics forever without improving or redesigning its approach.
findings.root_cause: Loop was created without a self-improvement mandate or a third-party verification requirement.
findings.recommended_fix: Add a self_improvement_mandate section to the loop script that detects flat outcomes, triggers redesign passes, registers in the self_improvement_loops.json registry with checker/runner/verifier, and requires independent signoff.

findings.title: Loop 'marketing-pulse' (multi-channel ad9540d0) has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Marketing-pulse job (ad9540d0) has no self-improvement mandate. When channels are flat, this loop will repeat the same tactics forever.
findings.root_cause: Loop was created without a self-improvement mandate.
findings.recommended_fix: Add a self_improvement_mandate section to the loop script that detects flat outcomes, triggers redesign passes, and requires independent signoff.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification even though architecture-owned gates are all green and the duplicate cron collision is resolved.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json --all on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live inspection is clean and should remain the source of truth instead of stale-count drift.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops stale topology claims from reappearing in architecture reports.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Add self-improvement mandate to pypi-auto-unblocker loop
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Without self-improvement, this loop will repeat flat-outcome tactics forever.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Loop gains the ability to detect flat outcomes and trigger redesign.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Add self-improvement mandate to marketing-pulse loop (ad9540d0)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Without self-improvement, this loop will repeat flat-outcome tactics forever.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Loop gains the ability to detect flat outcomes and trigger redesign.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Monitor transient error jobs (marketing-research-daily, backlink-tracker) for consecutive-error escalation
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Both jobs show single consecutive errors from gateway restart. If they don't self-recover, escalate.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Ran fresh checker→independent_verify→verifier pipeline. Checker: AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Independent verify: qualified_pass (ok:true). Verifier initial run triggered freshness gate failure (independent verification artifact predated loop_integrity_latest.json by 1s). Reran independent verification, then verifier — now ok:true, errors=[], freshness gate satisfied. Loop integrity: both covered loops ok. Self-repair audit: 20 loops, 2 HIGH findings (pre-existing).
proof: agent_architecture_independent_verify.py → ok:true, qualified_pass:true (rerun after loop integrity refresh)
agent_architecture_verifier.py → ok:true, errors:[] (second pass, freshness gate satisfied)

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Initial verifier run rejected independent verification as stale (1s gap vs loop_integrity_latest.json). Reran independent verification, then verifier. Verifier now ok:true, errors=[], freshness satisfied.
proof: agent_architecture_verifier.py first run: ok=false, error='independent verification artifact predates newer runtime evidence'

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable. Freshness gate repaired and satisfied this run.
external_blockers: marketing independent verification is not pass: 'fail'

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are now green across the board: checker OK, verifier OK with freshness gate satisfied, independent verification qualified_pass, loop integrity ok, topology coherent (21/20/1, zero enabled dupes). Marketing independent verification still fails closed with a 4-day-stale artifact.

notes: Architecture-owned topology, verifier, and independent verification are all green. Verifier freshness gate repaired and satisfied this run (independent verification rerun after loop integrity refresh).

Duplicate marketing-pulse cron job resolved: old job (85d5ff81) disabled (enabled=False). 21 total (--all), 20 enabled, 1 disabled, 0 enabled duplicate pairs. Name collision is benign (one enabled, one disabled).
Overall health: architecture_green. Architecture-owned gates all pass; remaining risk is external marketing evidence only.
Live topology: 21 total (--all), 20 enabled, 1 disabled, 0 enabled duplicate pairs. Three jobs running this cycle (system-health-monitor, codeberg-github-mirror-sync, agent-architecture-watchdog).
Architecture checker: AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Architecture verifier: ok:true (freshness gate satisfied). Independent verification: qualified_pass.
Loop integrity: both covered loops (ralph-docs-watchdog, agent-architecture-watchdog) status=ok.
Two transient error jobs (marketing-research-daily, backlink-tracker) from gateway restart. Neither is persistent.
Self-improvement gaps (pre-existing): pypi-auto-unblocker, marketing-pulse (ad9540d0). Both need mandates added.
Remaining blocker: marketing independent verification (fail, 4-day-stale artifact from June 2).
